name: zeromind
description: ZeroMind plugin for Claude Code — drive your browser-running Zero engine worlds via the @origozero/zeromind MCP server. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ (install from https://nodejs.org if needed, then restart Claude Code).

plugins.name: zeromind
plugins.description: ZeroMind MCP plugin: world list/create/launch/connect + engine tools (execute, guides, capture, VFS, bash) routed to the WASM engine running in your browser. REQUIRES Node.js 18+ — if you see 'status failed' after install, Node.js isn't on your PATH. Install from https://nodejs.org and restart Claude Code.
